episodes.title: She Escaped a Doomsday Cult and Became a Celebrity Artist
episodes.description:
What happens when someone survives a world built on fear, shame, control, and silence—and decides to rebuild anyway?

In this episode of Soul + Systems™, Jenn Fix sits down with internationally recognized artist Anita Navarre to explore survival, identity, healing, visibility, creativity, and what it really costs to become your authentic self.

Anita shares her journey from growing up inside a restrictive doomsday cult to becoming a globally recognized artist whose work celebrates freedom, self-expression, sexuality, and liberation.

Together, Jenn and Anita discuss:

✔ Escaping cult conditioning
✔ Rebuilding your identity
✔ Healing trauma in public
✔ Nervous system regulation
✔ Visibility and self-expression
✔ Why authenticity threatens control systems
✔ The cost of personal transformation
✔ Learning to trust yourself again

This conversation is for anyone who has ever felt trapped inside a version of themselves they've outgrown.
